runs.notes:
Gemini credentials are not configured, so benchmark runs use a deterministic simulated model. Trace: Planner framed the hybrid run. -> Research specialist mapped risks and diagnostics. -> Implementation specialist proposed code and test changes. -> Verifier reviewed the proposed solution for gaps. -> Final synthesizer produced the benchmark answer. Summary: Diagnosis: the session expiry path likely mixes wall-clock and elapsed-time assumptions.
Plan: centralize expiry math, add focused regression tests, and stage rollout behind metrics.
Residual risks: refresh token races and stale persisted …
